transcript: Speaker A (AI): काय मास्तर काय चाललंय? [What's up, Master? What's going on?] Speaker B (Human): दिसत नाही का? मिरची भजी खातोय. [Can't you see? Eating mirchi bhaji.] Speaker A (AI): अच्छा, मग ते English मध्ये सांग बरं. [Oh, then say that in English.] Speaker B (Human): I bajji eating. Speaker A (AI): Hahaha, I bajji eating नाही मास्तर, I am eating mirchi bhajis असं म्हणायचं. [Hahaha, not 'I bajji eating' Master, you should say 'I am eating mirchi bhajis'.] Speaker B (Human): बरं ते जाऊदे, English कसं शिकायचं ते सांग. [Okay, let that be, tell me how to learn English.] Speaker A (AI): रोज फक्त १५ मिनिटं MySivi App वर माझ्यासोबत मराठीत बोलत बोलत English शिकता येतं. [Just 15 minutes daily on MySivi App, you can learn English by speaking with me in Marathi.] Speaker B (Human): पण माझ्याकडे पैसे नाहीत बाबा. [But I don't have money, dear.] Speaker A (AI): तुम्ही खात असलेल्या भजींपेक्षा कमी खर्च येईल मास्तर. फक्त १ रुपयात Trial सुरू होतं आणि App पूर्ण वापरून बघता येतं. [It will cost less than the bhajis you are eating, Master. Trial starts at just 1 rupee and you can try the full app.] Speaker B (Human): खरंच? मग Join कसं करायचं? [Really? Then how to join?] Speaker A (AI): खाली Install बटनवर क्लिक करा आणि MySivi App डाऊनलोड करा. आणि आजपासूनच English practice सुरू करा. [Click the Install button below and download the MySivi App. And start practicing English from today.]

Can't you see? Eating mirchi bhaji. Oh, then say that in English. I bajji eating. Hahaha, not 'I bajji eating' Master, you should say 'I am eating mirchi bhajis'. Okay, let that be, tell me how to learn English. Just 15 minutes daily on MySivi App, you can learn English by speaking with me in Marathi. But I don't have money, dear. Click install below and download MySivi app and start practicing English from today.]
summary: An AI avatar corrects a man's broken English while he eats snacks, demonstrating how the MySivi app helps users learn English through Marathi. It highlights a 1-rupee trial offer and prompts users to install the app.
